beast_pools.trs: Okay, here's some Python code using Pandas and NumPy to analyze your dataset. I'll start by loading the data and then calculating correlation coefficients between income and the other variables, broken down by race. This will give us insights into the income distribution across different racial groups and their relationship with education and location
